name: The Fool
description: The look is "got dressed in the dark and nailed it." Embrace the chaotic good of your wardrobe by layering textures that have no business being together. Throw a dense layer over the sheer fabric and let the hemlines fight it out. It takes a specific kind of genius to pull off a clash with this much conviction.

styleEdits.title: The Happy Accident
styleEdits.description: The look is "got dressed in the dark and nailed it." Embrace the chaotic good of your wardrobe by layering textures that have no business being together. Throw a dense layer over the sheer fabric and let the hemlines fight it out. It takes a specific kind of genius to pull off a clash with this much conviction.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Tie a shoelace or fasten a button slightly wrong on purpose to invite healthy disruption.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe feels the most like a playful risk?

styleEdits.title: The Cliff Edge
styleEdits.description: Take a leap of faith today by prioritising agile shapes that skim the body. Light, breathable weaves are essential here, as thick fabrics just create unnecessary drag. Keep the ankles free and the accessories light enough to toss aside if the day demands a quick change of pace.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Rise onto your toes or shift your weight forward to test your balance before heading out.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your current outfit encourage movement or restrict it?

styleEdits.title: The Blank Slate
styleEdits.description: A fresh look needs undefined shapes and a palette cleanser of bare, unadorned textiles. Look for oversized cuts that refuse to dictate who you are supposed to be today. Rediscover the basics you usually overlook because natural textures like crisp cotton or fresh linen hold the most potential for reinvention.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Brush visible lint off your shoulder to symbolically clear the slate.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel like you are starting over?

name: The Magician
description: Treat your accessories like functional equipment today by focusing on utility, like deep pockets or convertible elements that actually do something. The cut should be sharp and intentional, suggesting a trick up your sleeve. Try mixing textures with a sheen against grounded natural fibres to prove you can master multiple textiles at once.

styleEdits.title: The Alchemist
styleEdits.description: Treat your accessories like functional equipment today by focusing on utility, like deep pockets or convertible elements that actually do something. The cut should be sharp and intentional, suggesting a trick up your sleeve. Try mixing textures with a sheen against grounded natural fibres to prove you can master multiple textiles at once.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Place a symbolic object in your pocket and tap it three times to activate your intent.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which accessory makes you feel the most capable?

styleEdits.title: The Showman
styleEdits.description: Today is a good day to make the outfit count. Don’t just get dressed, cast yourself in the lead role. Look for things like structured shoulders or high-contrast lapels that frame the face and naturally draw the eye upwards. Craft a distinct persona using the clothes already in your wardrobe and dress like you’re about to pull a rabbit (or a promotion) out of a hat.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Name one thing you want to 'manifest' today. Let that intention be the final layer you put on.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do your clothes speak for you before you’ve even said a word?

styleEdits.title: The Conductor
styleEdits.description: Run the room by finding the exact sweet spot between soft and sharp. If you talk with your hands, make the sleeves the focal point by pushing them up or choosing a massive, oversized cuff. A subtle sheen can help guide the focus exactly where you want it.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Rub your hands together to generate heat and focus before touching your clothes.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which piece of clothing highlights your hands or gestures the best?

name: The High Priestess
description: Today’s energy is giving “I know something you don't” so drape yourself in intentional mystery. Translucent layering over a solid base creates a smoke-and-mirrors profile that hints at the shape while keeping the actual details strictly off-limits. Try a sheer top under a sturdy jacket, or a mesh layer over a solid tank. Or keep the neckline higher and wrap close to the face to protect your peace. If it feels like you're wearing a secret, you've nailed it.

styleEdits.title: The Veil
styleEdits.description: Today’s energy is giving “I know something you don't” so drape yourself in intentional mystery. Translucent layering over a solid base creates a smoke-and-mirrors profile that hints at the shape while keeping the actual details strictly off-limits. Try a sheer top under a sturdy jacket, or a mesh layer over a solid tank. Or keep the neckline higher and wrap close to the face to protect your peace. If it feels like you're wearing a secret, you've nailed it.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Slowly drape a layer over your shoulders and pull the front edges together to seal your space before walking out the door.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Where are you currently over-explaining yourself through your style?

styleEdits.title: The Subconscious Flow
styleEdits.description: Intuition needs room to breathe, so skip the stiff collars and choose materials that flow. The fit needs to be relaxed enough to allow for deep breaths and gut checks. Physical comfort is a non-negotiable requirement today, so if the outfit requires you to suck it in, then it’s time for a rethink.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Take a slow, deep breath, deliberately letting your shoulders physically drop an inch as you exhale.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What piece of clothing do you wear simply because you feel you "should"?

styleEdits.title: The Keeper of Secrets
styleEdits.description: True power is quiet, so aim for a look that requires a closer look to appreciate. Make them work for the details by wearing textures that look simple from a distance but high-resolution up close. Matte finishes create a visual void that naturally draws the eye in. Keep the layers secured and your hands tucked safely inside deep pockets.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Place your hands over your solar plexus to guard your core.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: How do you wear authority without being the centre of attention?

name: The Empress
description: Prioritise the physical feel of the garment over everything else today. Think dense, plush, and super satisfying to touch. The drape should be softer and more rounded than usual, skipping the sharp tailoring that might kill the mood. Ensure everything feels decadent against the skin because comfort is truly the ultimate flex.

styleEdits.title: The Tactile Luxury
styleEdits.description: Prioritise the physical feel of the garment over everything else today. Think dense, plush, and super satisfying to touch. The drape should be softer and more rounded than usual, skipping the sharp tailoring that might kill the mood. Ensure everything feels decadent against the skin because comfort is truly the ultimate flex.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Run your palms down your sides to appreciate your own texture.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe feels the most decadent against your skin?

styleEdits.title: The Garden
styleEdits.description: Touch grass, literally. Connect to the organic by swapping out the synthetics for raw fibres that actually breathe and improve with age. Lean into patterns and textures that mimic the natural world, like unruly botanicals or vine-like motifs that feel alive, and ensure the fit is loose and expansive so you can unapologetically take up space.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stand near a window or plant and breathe in unison with the natural world for a moment.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your wardrobe feel alive or sterile?

styleEdits.title: The Throne
styleEdits.description: Opt for heavy-duty comfort today by choosing wrapping shapes like robes or belted coats that offer a feeling of being held. The weight of the fabric should feel heavy enough to ground you in the moment. Don't skip the accessories today; the day deserves bold decoration.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Adjust your collar or necklace as if you are straightening a crown.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which outfit makes you feel the most abundant?

name: The Emperor
description: If your outfit could hold its shape without you in it, you are on the right track. Skip the soft drapery and opt for a solid, highly visible construction. Clean, vertical, and severe lines instantly communicate that you are totally ready for whatever hits. Wrap yourself in rigid fabrics that create a tough, unbothered outer shell.

styleEdits.title: The Architect
styleEdits.description: If your outfit could hold its shape without you in it, you are on the right track. Skip the soft drapery and opt for a solid, highly visible construction. Clean, vertical, and severe lines instantly communicate that you are totally ready for whatever hits. Wrap yourself in rigid fabrics that create a tough, unbothered outer shell.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Plant your feet firmly and roll your shoulders back to match the structure of your jacket.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Where are you currently lacking structure in your wardrobe?

styleEdits.title: The Fortress
styleEdits.description: Boundaries are hot so let your outfit do the talking. High collars and rigid, impenetrable materials create a "Do Not Disturb" sign for the body. The silhouette should be boxy and defensive. It is a look that says "by appointment only" rather than "come on in."
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Button your coat or shirt all the way to the top to physically manifest your boundaries.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do your clothes make you feel safe or exposed?

styleEdits.title: The Legacy
styleEdits.description: Stick to the silhouettes that have survived decades rather than seasons, because they are classics for a reason. Dense, heritage-style textures communicate an authority that trends cannot touch. The fit should feel sharp, leaving zero room for sloppiness or fraying hems. Which items in your wardrobe feel indestructible?
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check the polish on your shoes or the crispness of a cuff to ensure total discipline.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe has the most history?

name: The Hierophant
description: There is a certain satisfaction in looking like you run a very stylish secret society. We’re talking matching sets, monochrome looks, and distinct collars. Adhere to a strict dress code where every button is fastened and every hem is correct. Lean fully into the discipline of a strict uniform to eliminate decision fatigue. It’s not a lack of imagination, it’s a commitment to your brand.

styleEdits.title: The Uniform
styleEdits.description: There is a certain satisfaction in looking like you run a very stylish secret society. We’re talking matching sets, monochrome looks, and distinct collars. Adhere to a strict dress code where every button is fastened and every hem is correct. Lean fully into the discipline of a strict uniform to eliminate decision fatigue. It’s not a lack of imagination, it’s a commitment to your brand.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Fasten a button or zip with deliberate slowness respecting the ritual of dressing.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you dress to stand out or to belong?

styleEdits.title: The Classicist
styleEdits.description: Classics are classics for a reason. Today, reach for the foundational pieces that actually anchor your wardrobe instead of the wildcards. Ditch the experimental in favour of symmetry and high polish. The fabric should look pristine and meticulously maintained.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Align your accessories symmetrically before walking out the door.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which "classic" piece do you actually wear the most?

styleEdits.title: The Mentor
styleEdits.description: The aesthetic is approachable authority. Opt for layers with weight and soft structure that suggest you actually know what you are doing. Choose pieces that feel substantial and grounded rather than flighty trends. Pass on the flashy logos; real influence does not require a billboard.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Smooth down the front of your outfit and set an intention to teach or learn something today.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your style reflect your current maturity or a past version of yourself?

name: The Lovers
description: Opposites attract, so try pairing your toughest fabric with your softest, most fragile one. Notice how the tension between a rigid silhouette and a fluid drape creates visual harmony. Pair conflicting pieces, like thick leather over a silk-like base, or robust footwear paired with a sheer layer. They might absolutely hate each other on the hanger, but on you? It’s pure chemistry. Let the friction spark a little romance.

styleEdits.title: The Duality
styleEdits.description: Opposites attract, so try pairing your toughest fabric with your softest, most fragile one. Notice how the tension between a rigid silhouette and a fluid drape creates visual harmony. Pair conflicting pieces, like thick leather over a silk-like base, or robust footwear paired with a sheer layer. They might absolutely hate each other on the hanger, but on you? It’s pure chemistry. Let the friction spark a little romance.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Fasten two separate layers together with a pin or belt to physically symbolize union.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which two items in your wardrobe seem to hate each other and can you make them friends?

styleEdits.title: The Commitment
styleEdits.description: Commit to the bit and create a silhouette that connects effortlessly from top to bottom. Embrace the total look of a matching set or a single seamless piece like a boiler suit. There is undeniable power in total cohesion, so let one major aesthetic decision do the heavy lifting for you today.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stand with your feet perfectly parallel and centre your weight before walking out.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What happens to your mood when you fully commit to a single aesthetic choice for the day?

styleEdits.title: The Exposure
styleEdits.description: Choose an aesthetic that feels open rather than guarded today. Loosen the fit to let the air in. Focus on that easy, lived-in energy instead of pristine, untouchable perfection. You want a vibe that makes you feel the most comfortable in your own skin, while remaining totally in control of the situation.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Apply a scent to your pulse points to mark your own boundaries.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel the most vulnerable?

name: The Chariot
description: A structured outer layer with a defined waist acts as a literal chassis for your personal vehicle. Look for hardware details like substantial zips or buckles that suggest industrial strength. Build a look that can withstand a collision with a busy schedule without scuffing your polish.

styleEdits.title: The Armor
styleEdits.description: A structured outer layer with a defined waist acts as a literal chassis for your personal vehicle. Look for hardware details like substantial zips or buckles that suggest industrial strength. Build a look that can withstand a collision with a busy schedule without scuffing your polish.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Zip or button your outer layer all the way up to seal yourself into your machine.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit feel like a costume or a shield?

styleEdits.title: The Velocity
styleEdits.description: Eliminate any drag that slows you down today. Go for streamlined silhouettes and fabrics that don't hold you back. Ditch the billowing layers, oversized scarves, or anything that requires constant adjustment. Dress like you are already halfway out the door.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check the soles of your shoes for debris to ensure a smooth path forward.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Are you dressing for where you are or where you are going?

styleEdits.title: The Control
styleEdits.description: Use structure to keep your energy and your silhouette centred. Opt for thick belts, heavy waistbands, or cinched cuts that lock you in. We want fabrics with resistance that keep the form contained even when the road gets bumpy. You need a look that stays sharp at high speeds.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Tighten your belt or watch strap one notch further to physically anchor your intent.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What item of clothing makes you feel the most powerful?

name: Strength
description: True power is gentle so opt for soft textures that command attention simply by being good quality. The cut should be relaxed yet resilient, able to stretch without snapping. It is the style equivalent of a deep breath. Lean into tactile comfort with plush weaves or heavy knits that drape perfectly without needing to be forced into place.

styleEdits.title: The Velvet Glove
styleEdits.description: True power is gentle so opt for soft textures that command attention simply by being good quality. The cut should be relaxed yet resilient, able to stretch without snapping. It is the style equivalent of a deep breath. Lean into tactile comfort with plush weaves or heavy knits that drape perfectly without needing to be forced into place.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stroke the sleeve of your garment to soothe your own nervous system.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which fabric brings you the most peace?

styleEdits.title: The Endurance
styleEdits.description: Play the long game and prioritise endurance with footwear that can handle high mileage. We’re opting for fabrics that keep their composure and refuse to crumple, crease, or lose their shape under pressure. The vibe is effortless stamina and ensuring your fit looks as fresh at the end of the day as it did at the start.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Flex your toes inside your shoes to remind yourself of your hidden reserves.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item has survived the longest in your wardrobe?

styleEdits.title: The Wild Side
styleEdits.description: Channel your inner animal through texture with presence. Look for fabrics with a visible grain, pile, or density that feel instinctive to touch. Keep the cuts simple to let the texture dominate. It is about wearing your instincts on the outside. Let the world see you are not to be trifled with, even when you’re just stepping out for milk.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Shake out the tension before stepping out.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you dress to blend in or to hunt?

name: The Hermit
description: Today calls for "celebrity dodging the paparazzi" energy. Oversized proportions and dense textures act as a personal boundary keeping the world at arm's length. Prioritise lofty garments that swallow you whole. If someone tries to make small talk, your collar should be high enough to act as a physical barrier. Think of it as social distancing via excellent styling.

styleEdits.title: The Incognito Mode
styleEdits.description: Today calls for "celebrity dodging the paparazzi" energy. Oversized proportions and dense textures act as a personal boundary keeping the world at arm's length. Prioritise lofty garments that swallow you whole. If someone tries to make small talk, your collar should be high enough to act as a physical barrier. Think of it as social distancing via excellent styling.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Pull your collar up or adjust your neckline to cover your throat, physically sealing your energy in.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: When was the last time you dressed purely for yourself, with absolutely zero audience in mind?

styleEdits.title: The Utilitarian
styleEdits.description: You need an ensemble that allows you to disappear while getting things done. Go ghost mode by focusing on utility and clean lines. Choose sturdy textiles like leather, canvas or raw denim that hold their own structure. Look for details like deep pockets that allow you to retreat fully into the garment. There is productive peace in being unreachable.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Place your hands firmly in your pockets for five seconds to ground yourself before stepping out the door.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do your current accessories serve a practical purpose or are they just weighing you down?

styleEdits.title: The Big Drape
styleEdits.description: Play with volume to completely obscure your frame. Select floor-grazing lengths or substantial midi cuts that swish satisfyingly as you walk. The goal is flow and movement rather than restriction. Wrap yourself up and let the generous drapery do all the talking today.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Give your coat or layer a deliberate shake to clear off stale vibes before putting it on.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does the fit of your clothes allow you to move freely or are you constantly adjusting them?

name: Wheel of Fortune
description: Luck favours the recycled today so dig into the archives for an old, lived-in or vintage piece. Mixing eras proves that good design always cycles back around. Pair a retro layer with highly modern footwear, or vintage denim with a crisp, contemporary shirt. Let the wear and tear on a garment be a badge of honour. You are spinning the wheel of fashion history and landing on "timeless cool".

styleEdits.title: The Cycle
styleEdits.description: Luck favours the recycled today so dig into the archives for an old, lived-in or vintage piece. Mixing eras proves that good design always cycles back around. Pair a retro layer with highly modern footwear, or vintage denim with a crisp, contemporary shirt. Let the wear and tear on a garment be a badge of honour. You are spinning the wheel of fashion history and landing on "timeless cool".
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Spin around once in front of the mirror to physically turn your luck.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which piece of clothing have you saved hoping it will come back in style?

styleEdits.title: The Rotation
styleEdits.description: Choose silhouettes that create a full circle of volume around the body. A-line cuts, wide-leg trousers, or cape-like coats work perfectly here. The fabric should possess enough weight to flare out dramatically when you turn a corner, creating your own gravity as you move. If life spins you around you might as well look spectacular.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Put your clothes on in a different order than usual to disrupt the cycle.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you wear the same few outfits on a loop?

styleEdits.title: The Gamble
styleEdits.description: The day's energy is unpredictable, so let your outfit be a gamble. Reach into the wardrobe and pull out two things you rarely wear together. Clash prints, mix winter textures with summer weights, or pair formal tailoring with athletic gear. Trust in the universe's styling.  Sometimes the biggest sartorial risks yield the highest visual rewards.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Flip a coin to decide between two accessories.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: When was the last time you took a risk with your style?

name: Justice
description: Seek equilibrium through perfect symmetry in your lapels and hemlines. A well-cut blazer or a perfectly centred parting restores order to a chaotic world. Ensure the visual weight is distributed evenly across your frame. Everything should sit exactly where it was designed to. You are the arbiter of taste today so let the fit show it.

styleEdits.title: The Scale
styleEdits.description: Seek equilibrium through perfect symmetry in your lapels and hemlines. A well-cut blazer or a perfectly centred parting restores order to a chaotic world. Ensure the visual weight is distributed evenly across your frame. Everything should sit exactly where it was designed to. You are the arbiter of taste today so let the fit show it.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Adjust your clothing until you feel physically balanced on both sides.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your wardrobe reflect who you actually are or who you want to be?

styleEdits.title: The Verdict
styleEdits.description: Cut through the noise with sharp tailoring and defined edges. Look for crisp collars and lower halves with creases sharp enough to make a statement. Save slouchy, unstructured fabrics for another day and focus entirely on severe, precise lines.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Run a finger along a sharp edge or seam to sharpen your focus.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Is your style currently too loose or too rigid?

styleEdits.title: The Adjustment
styleEdits.description: Proportions are everything, so pay attention to how things hang on your body. Ill-fitting garments completely distort the silhouette, so adjust straps, tighten belts, or tuck in hems to achieve an honest, balanced shape. Respect the reality of your form. Justice is about clarity, and a sharp outline removes all reasonable doubt.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Align your posture to match the structure of your outfit.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What do you keep wearing even though it feels wrong?

name: The Hanged Man
description: Try flipping the script by wearing things entirely out of order or layering lengths in reverse. Think about layering your lengths in reverse, perhaps letting a longer shirt hang out below a cropped jacket, or wearing a highly structured piece underneath a soft, slouchy one. Disrupt the standard formula of dressing to signal that you operate on your own timeline. A little confusion is just part of the aesthetic.

styleEdits.title: The Inversion
styleEdits.description: Try flipping the script by wearing things entirely out of order or layering lengths in reverse. Think about layering your lengths in reverse, perhaps letting a longer shirt hang out below a cropped jacket, or wearing a highly structured piece underneath a soft, slouchy one. Disrupt the standard formula of dressing to signal that you operate on your own timeline. A little confusion is just part of the aesthetic.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Bend forward at the waist as far as feels comfortable and let your arms hang loose to reverse the blood flow.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What would happen if you broke your own fashion rules?

styleEdits.title: The Suspension
styleEdits.description: Surrender control with oversized shapes that hang from the shoulders without clinging. Suspended silhouettes, loose tunics or pinafore styles work well to emphasise the feeling of weightlessness. Let gravity do all the work for you. There is a specific kind of chic in looking like you are simply waiting for the rest of the world to catch up.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Pause for ten seconds with one shoe on and one shoe off to embrace the limbo.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel the most relaxed?

styleEdits.title: The Pause
styleEdits.description: Halt the hustle with garments that naturally encourage a slower pace. A tapered ankle or a heavy, enveloping outer layer invites a bit of stillness into the day. Rushing becomes impossible when your outfit requires a slow, deliberate walk. Embrace the inconvenience as a mindful practice.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Take a moment to simply stand still in your outfit before engaging with the world.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do your clothes allow you to rest?

name: Death
description: Evolving your look in real time is the goal today. Focus on layers that peel away easily to reveal a completely different silhouette underneath. A heavy, structured outer shell giving way to a fluid base layer creates a brilliant contrast. Try building an outfit that looks entirely different the second the jacket comes off. Let the old look fade by lunchtime so the new one can breathe.

styleEdits.title: The Shedding
styleEdits.description: Evolving your look in real time is the goal today. Focus on layers that peel away easily to reveal a completely different silhouette underneath. A heavy, structured outer shell giving way to a fluid base layer creates a brilliant contrast. Try building an outfit that looks entirely different the second the jacket comes off. Let the old look fade by lunchtime so the new one can breathe.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Remove a layer or accessory with deliberate slowness to symbolize leaving the past behind.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe belongs to a version of you that no longer exists?

styleEdits.title: The Skeleton
styleEdits.description: Strip the look back to its bare bones. Exposed seams, raw hems, and deconstructed tailoring brilliantly reveal how a garment is actually built. Alternatively, try removing the accessories, patterns and the styling noise until only the sharpest foundation remains. Let the superficial fall away so the essentials can stand out.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Run your fingers over the seams of your clothes to connect with the structure holding you together.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What are the bare bones of your personal style?

styleEdits.title: The Compost
styleEdits.description: Give a forgotten piece a brand new context today by styling it against its original purpose. Consider wearing a highly formal layer with heavy combat boots, or use a silk scarf as a makeshift belt. Take something old and wear it with zero nostalgia for how it was "supposed" to be worn.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Turn a collar up or cuff a sleeve differently to physically alter the garment’s destiny.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What piece of clothing deserves a second life?

name: Temperance
description: Finding the perfect mix is key, so blend your textiles with precision. Combine the rough with the smooth by fusing dense matte finishes with fluid high-shine elements. The proportions should feel continuous, refusing to settle into one category. You are the style alchemist of your own look today.

styleEdits.title: The Blend
styleEdits.description: Finding the perfect mix is key, so blend your textiles with precision. Combine the rough with the smooth by fusing dense matte finishes with fluid high-shine elements. The proportions should feel continuous, refusing to settle into one category. You are the style alchemist of your own look today.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Mix two different perfumes or lotions to create a scent that is uniquely yours today.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you tend to dress in extremes or do you prefer the middle ground?

styleEdits.title: The Gradient
styleEdits.description: Look for colours or textures that transition seamlessly from one weight to another without any jarring lines. Aim for tonal dressing where the shades gently melt into one another. The fit should hover comfortably between tailored and loose, allowing the fabric to float effortlessly around the body. Keep the visual rhythm smooth enough to create a sense of calm.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Pour a glass of water and drink it in today’s outfit.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit feel balanced or top-heavy?

styleEdits.title: The Chemist
styleEdits.description: Balance requires careful measurement of your adornments. If you choose a substantial statement piece, keep the background noise to a minimum. Distribute the visual weight evenly so the look feels cohesive rather than cluttered. Keep the proportions beautifully exact.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Take a moment to adjust your sleeves or hem until the balance feels 'just right'.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which accessory brings your whole look together?

name: The Devil
description: Lean into a restricted aesthetic with strapping details, tight fastenings or structured waists that hold you tight. Slick, coated textures or high-shine finishes amplify this wonderfully indulgent energy. Enjoy the feeling of the garment gripping the body and unapologetically surrender to the fit.

styleEdits.title: The Bind
styleEdits.description: Lean into a restricted aesthetic with strapping details, tight fastenings or structured waists that hold you tight. Slick, coated textures or high-shine finishes amplify this wonderfully indulgent energy. Enjoy the feeling of the garment gripping the body and unapologetically surrender to the fit.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Tighten a belt or lace, then loosen it until you’re perfectly comfortable so you know you’re in control.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What fashion trend are you irresistibly drawn to?

styleEdits.title: The Obsession
styleEdits.description: Give in to the craving for tactile excess and dress like an expensive villain. Pile on the textures that make you feel unapologetically decadent. Indulge in materials that both feel good and demand attention. It feels good to be completely consumed by the outfit every once in a while.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check yourself out in a reflective surface and admire your outfit.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe makes you feel the most indulgent?

styleEdits.title: The Chain
styleEdits.description: Hardware is the undeniable focal point today. Chunky metal detailing on bags, boots or belts grounds the look in earthly delights. Let the accessories clink and rattle to announce your presence as you move. We are devoted to our style and loving every minute of it.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Jingle your keys or jewellery to hear the sound of your own presence.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Are you wearing the clothes or are the clothes wearing you?

name: The Tower
description: Even if life feels like a dumpster fire, you might as well look like the spark, darling. We’re doing asymmetry that says 'It’s a crisis but I’m making it fashion’. Jagged cuts offer an unexpected, jarring shift in the outline. Look for garments that appear deconstructed or distressed in the most intentional way. Disruption is the aesthetic, so leave a button undone and let the hair go wild. An untucked shirt isn't a mistake today, it’s a protest.

styleEdits.title: The Crash
styleEdits.description: Even if life feels like a dumpster fire, you might as well look like the spark, darling. We’re doing asymmetry that says 'It’s a crisis but I’m making it fashion’. Jagged cuts offer an unexpected, jarring shift in the outline. Look for garments that appear deconstructed or distressed in the most intentional way. Disruption is the aesthetic, so leave a button undone and let the hair go wild. An untucked shirt isn't a mistake today, it’s a protest.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Deliberately mess up your hair or unbutton a cuff to invite controlled chaos.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: If you had to rebuild your style from zero what would you keep?

styleEdits.title: The Aftermath
styleEdits.description: Prepare for any shake-up with shock-absorbing soles and protective outer shells. You need a look that feels durable and ready for anything. Tough utility fabrics, reinforced knees, or thick canvas suggest you are prepared for rough terrain. Stand tall amidst the debris.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stomp your feet firmly on the ground to test the stability of your foundation.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which pair of shoes makes you feel indestructible?

styleEdits.title: The Flash
styleEdits.description: Lightning strikes unexpectedly, so channel that high-voltage energy today with jagged prints or distinct textures. Clash patterns that have absolutely no business being together, like neon with heritage plaid, to simulate the collapse of structure. It creates a visual explosion that clears the air. Wear the clash with absolute conviction.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Snap your fingers or clap your hands to mimic the crack of thunder.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What fashion rule are you terrified to break?

name: The Star
description: Hope has a special sheen to it. Gravitate towards fabrics that easily catch and refract the light. Silks, satins, or subtle high-shine textures bring an especially luminous, expensive quality to the silhouette today. The cut should be open and optimistic, perhaps exposing the neck or arms. The aim is a polished, glowing aesthetic. You are the distant light in someone else’s gloom so remember to shine without apology.

styleEdits.title: The Glow
styleEdits.description: Hope has a special sheen to it. Gravitate towards fabrics that easily catch and refract the light. Silks, satins, or subtle high-shine textures bring an especially luminous, expensive quality to the silhouette today. The cut should be open and optimistic, perhaps exposing the neck or arms. The aim is a polished, glowing aesthetic. You are the distant light in someone else’s gloom so remember to shine without apology.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stand in a patch of natural light and let your outfit absorb the sun.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel the most optimistic?

styleEdits.title: The Cleanse
styleEdits.description: Keep the palette and the lines incredibly clean today. Clothes and fabrics that feel fresh from the line work best. The fit should be loose enough to allow full circulation. Wash away the debris of the past with pure, unadulterated minimalism and zero unnecessary layers.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Splash cold water on your wrists before putting on your bracelets or watch.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your style feel cluttered or clear?

styleEdits.title: The Exposure
styleEdits.description: Remember to let the skin breathe. Sheer panels, wide necklines, or cut-outs offer a glimpse of what is underneath. Radiate strength and confidence through openness rather than hiding behind heavy layers, because you have nothing left to conceal.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Take a deep breath and expand your chest against the fabric of your top.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What part of yourself are you finally ready to show off?

name: The Moon
description: Reality is subjective, so why should your hemline be fixed? We’re leaning into delusional chic with some distortion today. Play with proportions that confuse the eye. Blur the line between where the fabric ends and the body begins by using extra-long sleeves or pooled hemlines. If they can't tell where you end and the fabric begins, they can't pin you down. Stay a little mysterious, stay a little unhinged.

styleEdits.title: The Illusion
styleEdits.description: Reality is subjective, so why should your hemline be fixed? We’re leaning into delusional chic with some distortion today. Play with proportions that confuse the eye. Blur the line between where the fabric ends and the body begins by using extra-long sleeves or pooled hemlines. If they can't tell where you end and the fabric begins, they can't pin you down. Stay a little mysterious, stay a little unhinged.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Look at your shadow on the pavement and watch how your outfit changes the shape.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you use fashion to reveal the truth or to tell a lie?

styleEdits.title: The Dream
styleEdits.description: Blur the line between lounge and daywear by bringing fluid movement into the daylight. Focus on unstructured forms like silky textures, wide-leg lower halves, or robe-like coats that drape heavily. Prioritise garments that feel soft enough to snooze in. Reality is subjective so make yours comfortable.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Close your eyes for three seconds and imagine you are still in bed.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which outfit feels like a dream to wear?

styleEdits.title: The Wild
styleEdits.description: Trust your gut on the weirdest pairing in your wardrobe today. We want textures that feel raw, tactile, and slightly feral to the touch, like brushed suede or heavily distressed knits. Navigate your way through the fabric by feeling. Allow the aesthetic to be a little bit strange and entirely driven by texture.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Run your hand against the grain of a fabric to feel the resistance.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What is the "weirdest" thing you own?

name: The Sun
description: Opt for luminous textures that amplify natural light rather than absorbing it. Use high-shine hardware to act as a conductor for the energy. The fit should be bold and unmissable, commanding the room through pure brightness alone. You are beaming, baby, don’t dim that light.

styleEdits.title: The Spotlight
styleEdits.description: Opt for luminous textures that amplify natural light rather than absorbing it. Use high-shine hardware to act as a conductor for the energy. The fit should be bold and unmissable, commanding the room through pure brightness alone. You are beaming, baby, don’t dim that light.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stand in front of a mirror and smile before you look at the clothes to set the baseline.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe brings you unadulterated joy?

styleEdits.title: The Vitamin D
styleEdits.description: Saturated hues vibrate with excellent visual energy. Look for bold, playful prints that refuse to take themselves seriously. The fit should be loose enough to accommodate a high-energy mood and expansive movement. Ditch the sensible tones today for the loudest, brightest colour you own. Radiate warmth and let the cynics stick to grey.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Turn your face upward to the sky for ten seconds to recharge your solar battery.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you dress to hide or to shine?

styleEdits.title: The Exposure
styleEdits.description: Embrace total visibility today with a statement piece that demands attention from across the street. Clarity is the ultimate accessory, so ensure every line, hem, and seam is highly intentional. Keep the sunglasses close to finish off a blindingly bright, hyper-confident look.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Clean your sunglasses or spectacles to ensure you are seeing clearly.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What would you wear if you knew everyone would love it?

name: Judgement
description: Elevate your aesthetic with vertical lines that immediately draw the eye upward. High collars, long coats or elevated soles suggest a higher state of confidence. Leave the pieces that drag you down into the mundane in the wardrobe for now.

styleEdits.title: The Reckoning
styleEdits.description: Elevate your aesthetic with vertical lines that immediately draw the eye upward. High collars, long coats or elevated soles suggest a higher state of confidence. Leave the pieces that drag you down into the mundane in the wardrobe for now.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stand on your tiptoes and drop your heels firmly to wake up your system.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which old trend are you finally ready to forgive yourself for wearing?

styleEdits.title: The Wake-Up Call
styleEdits.description: Sleepwalking through your wardrobe choices ends now. Pick an ensemble that feels like a jolt of caffeine to the system. Sharp tailoring, pressed collars, and structured fabrics create a highly awakened silhouette. The look should be definitive, highly polished, and leave absolutely no room for indecisive styling. Forget about rehearsing for who you might be and dress like the person you have finally become.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Splash cold water on your face before dressing to symbolise the fresh start.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your wardrobe reflect your past or your potential?

styleEdits.title: The Final Edit
styleEdits.description: Practice the art of the edit by stripping away the excess and focusing on the absolute staples in your wardrobe. Wear the one outfit that defines you completely. It is about quality over quantity and soul over micro-trends. If it fails to sing to your soul it stays in the drawer. If a layer does not serve the shape, remove it.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Remove one accessory before leaving to practice the art of the edit.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: If you could only save one outfit from a fire, which one is it?

name: The World
description: Build a cohesive, integrated look where every single element speaks seamlessly to the others. Layer textures that envelope the body in a continuous, unbroken line. Look for wrapping shapes and a tonal palette that locks the entire outfit together perfectly from head to toe.

styleEdits.title: The Complete Package
styleEdits.description: Build a cohesive, integrated look where every single element speaks seamlessly to the others. Layer textures that envelope the body in a continuous, unbroken line. Look for wrapping shapes and a tonal palette that locks the entire outfit together perfectly from head to toe.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Spin in a slow circle to acknowledge your own completeness.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit feel like a random collection of parts or a whole?

styleEdits.title: The Traveler
styleEdits.description: Bring the outside in by mixing global influences and distinct textures. Attempt  eclectic pairings by combining the sharp structure of city tailoring with the relaxed ease of utility wear. The silhouette should feel boundless and heavily layered, suggesting you are ready to adapt to literally any environment. You are a citizen of the world so look like you are part of it.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check the label of your garment to see where in the world it travelled from.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: How does your environment influence what you wear?

styleEdits.title: The Synthesis
styleEdits.description: Everything comes together today. Harmonise the conflicting parts of your style into one seamless whole. Match the bag to the boots and the energy to the room. It is the satisfaction of the final puzzle piece clicking into place. Walk like someone who has finally got it all figured out.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Join your hands together to close the circuit of your energy.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What is the signature look that you want to be remembered for? # Suit of Swords

name: Ace of Cups
description: Some days the cup just runneth over so let your wardrobe be just as fluid. Look for textiles that pour over the body like water and refuse to hold a rigid shape. Silk, rayon, or soft jersey are your best friends here. You are a vessel for good energy so dress like a very chic waterfall.

styleEdits.title: The Overflow
styleEdits.description: Some days the cup just runneth over so let your wardrobe be just as fluid. Look for textiles that pour over the body like water and refuse to hold a rigid shape. Silk, rayon, or soft jersey are your best friends here. You are a vessel for good energy so dress like a very chic waterfall.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Pour yourself a glass of water and drink it slowly to connect with the element of flow.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which fabric in your wardrobe feels most like liquid against your skin?

styleEdits.title: The Open Heart
styleEdits.description: Vulnerability is a strength so consider an open neckline or a lighter, more breathable weave to symbolise letting people in. Soft, pastel tones or gentle neutrals can communicate a willingness to connect. Skip the dense padding or stiff collars that block communication. Dress with the softness you wish to receive from the world.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Place a hand on your chest and take a deep breath to centre your heart space.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit invite connection or build a wall?

styleEdits.title: The Intuition
styleEdits.description: Your gut instinct is your stylist today. Ignore the trends and reach for the item that emotionally calls to you even if it makes no logical sense. Mix textures based on how they feel rather than how they look. It is about sensory satisfaction and trusting that if it feels right it will look right.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Close your eyes and run your hands over your clothes to truly feel the texture.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which outfit acts as a mood ring for your emotions?

name: Two of Cups
description: Play with symmetry in your look today. A perfectly balanced silhouette where the left side mirrors the right creates visual harmony. If it feels fun, you could even coordinate your look with a partner or a close friend for a subtle nod to the day’s energy of duality. It is about finding the perfect match within your own wardrobe.

styleEdits.title: The Mirror
styleEdits.description: Play with symmetry in your look today. A perfectly balanced silhouette where the left side mirrors the right creates visual harmony. If it feels fun, you could even coordinate your look with a partner or a close friend for a subtle nod to the day’s energy of duality. It is about finding the perfect match within your own wardrobe.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stand in front of the mirror and look yourself in the eye to acknowledge your own best friend.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you have two pieces that work together in perfect harmony?

styleEdits.title: The Connection
styleEdits.description: Focus on the points of connection in your outfit such as where a top meets a trouser or where a sleeve meets a cuff. Ensure these transitions are smooth and intentional. Knotted details, ties, or clasps that bring two sides together symbolise unity. Celebrate the art of bringing things together.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Tie a knot or fasten a clasp with the intention of strengthening a bond.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which accessory helps pull your whole look together?

styleEdits.title: The Harmony
styleEdits.description: Clashing is out and cohesion is in. Aim for a tonal look where every shade belongs to the same colour family. The visual effect is soothing and unified suggesting a lack of internal conflict. Soften the contrast and let the colours blend into one another like a watercolour painting.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Smooth down your lapels or sleeves to physically smooth out any friction.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit feel like a disparate collection or a unified whole?

name: Three of Cups
description: The day is charged with social connection energy so dress for the party, even if it is just a party of one. We want maximum joy, zero apologies. Fun textures like feathers, fringe, or playful prints invite conversation and joy. Wear the item that always gets compliments from strangers. If you aren't the most interesting thing in a three-block radius, add more sequins.

styleEdits.title: The Squad
styleEdits.description: The day is charged with social connection energy so dress for the party, even if it is just a party of one. We want maximum joy, zero apologies. Fun textures like feathers, fringe, or playful prints invite conversation and joy. Wear the item that always gets compliments from strangers. If you aren't the most interesting thing in a three-block radius, add more sequins.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Raise a coffee cup or glass in a silent toast to your community.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What do you wear when you want to have fun?

styleEdits.title: The Trio
styleEdits.description: The rule of three is a classic design principle so utilise it. Try layering three distinct lengths or combining three different textures for a look that feels complete and dynamic. A third piece like a vest or a scarf adds that necessary depth to a basic outfit, creating a highly satisfying visual rhythm.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Arrange three accessories together to create a little vignette of style.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you stop at two layers or do you go for the third?

styleEdits.title: The Abundance
styleEdits.description: More is more today. Don't be afraid to stack the rings or layer the necklaces. A maximalist approach reflects the fullness of your social cup. Celebrate the abundance in your wardrobe by wearing your favourites all at once in one unashamedly bold look.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Jingle your bracelets or keys to make a joyful noise.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which accessories make you feel the most festive?

name: Four of Cups
description: The 'I have nothing to wear' lie ends today. When your wardrobe is feeling uninspired, it’s time to take a  deeper look. Dig to the bottom of the drawer, find that forgotten relic you haven't seen since 2019 and resurrect it with zero nostalgia. Style it like it’s brand new and pretend you don’t remember its past. It’s not old, it’s 'vintage archive' now.

styleEdits.title: The Shop Your Closet
styleEdits.description: The 'I have nothing to wear' lie ends today. When your wardrobe is feeling uninspired, it’s time to take a  deeper look. Dig to the bottom of the drawer, find that forgotten relic you haven't seen since 2019 and resurrect it with zero nostalgia. Style it like it’s brand new and pretend you don’t remember its past. It’s not old, it’s 'vintage archive' now.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Turn a hanger around or fold a piece differently to signal a fresh perspective.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What item have you been ignoring that deserves a second chance?

styleEdits.title: The Disconnect
styleEdits.description: A hoodie with the hood up or a hat pulled low signals that you are in your own world today. Sometimes you just want to check out and that is valid. Choose muted tones that don't demand engagement from others. It is a look that says "do not disturb" in the most stylish way possible.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Put your hands in your pockets and enjoy the containment of your own energy.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you dress to be seen or to hide?

styleEdits.title: The Re-Evaluation
styleEdits.description: Apathy can be a sign that your style needs a shakeup. Take a critical look at your silhouette and try changing the proportions. Tuck in a shirt that is usually loose or belt a jacket that is usually open. Small tweaks can wake up a tired wardrobe without spending a penny.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Adjust one detail of your outfit in the mirror until it feels "new."
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Are you bored with your clothes or just bored with how you style them?

name: Five of Cups
description: Today’s aesthetic is "emotional support outfit." Wrap yourself in oversized knits, heavy shawls or comfy coats that act as a physical barrier to the world. Soft, tactile fabrics that feel kind against the skin can help soothe the rough edges. It is perfectly okay to hide inside your clothes until further notice.

styleEdits.title: The Comfort Blanket
styleEdits.description: Today’s aesthetic is "emotional support outfit." Wrap yourself in oversized knits, heavy shawls or comfy coats that act as a physical barrier to the world. Soft, tactile fabrics that feel kind against the skin can help soothe the rough edges. It is perfectly okay to hide inside your clothes until further notice.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Pull your sleeves down over your hands for a moment of tactile comfort.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which garment feels like a hug?

styleEdits.title: The Mourning Veil
styleEdits.description: There is a dark romance in the air so lean into the drama of the shadow. Light-absorbing textures, sheer overlays, or dense fabrics acknowledge the depth of the mood while looking incredibly chic. A pair of oversized sunglasses can act as a modern veil. Process your emotions through the drama of your attire.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Lower your sunglasses or adjust a brim to create a barrier.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you allow your style to reflect your sadness?

styleEdits.title: The Salvage
styleEdits.description: Build an outfit around the sturdy, foundational basics that have never let you down. A classic pair of trousers or a reliable outer layer proves that some things endure. Find stability in the permanent fixtures of your wardrobe.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Brush lint off a favourite piece to show it some gratitude.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which items in your wardrobe have stood by you the longest?

name: Six of Cups
description: Sometimes it’s good to look back in order to move forward, so try incorporating vintage or retro elements into your look today. Wear a piece that reminds you of a happy time or an item inherited from a loved one. Mixing eras creates a timeless quality that feels deeply personal. Let your clothes tell the story of where you came from.

styleEdits.title: The Nostalgia
styleEdits.description: Sometimes it’s good to look back in order to move forward, so try incorporating vintage or retro elements into your look today. Wear a piece that reminds you of a happy time or an item inherited from a loved one. Mixing eras creates a timeless quality that feels deeply personal. Let your clothes tell the story of where you came from.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Smell a collar or a scarf to trigger a scent memory of the fabric.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe holds the most sentimental value?

styleEdits.title: The Inner Child
styleEdits.description: Reconnect with the joy of dressing up by wearing something playful. Dungarees, bright primary colours, or whimsical prints tap into that youthful energy. Forget about "sophisticated" today and focus on “happy”. If your six-year-old self would love it then wear it.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Swing your arms or skip a step to embrace youthful movement.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What did you love wearing as a child that you could reinterpret today?

styleEdits.title: The Gift
styleEdits.description: Generosity is today’s theme so perhaps wear something that was given to you as a gift. It wraps you in the intention of the giver. Alternatively treat your outfit as a gift to the world by adding a flower or a beautiful colour that brightens someone else's day.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Touch a piece of jewellery or clothing that was a gift and think of the giver.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you wear the things people give you?

name: Seven of Cups
description: Surreal prints, iridescent fabrics, or fluid shapes that blur the body's lines fit today’s reality bending mood perfectly. There is no better time for fantasy and imagination. Wear the combination that makes no sense on paper but looks like a beautiful fever dream in the mirror.

styleEdits.title: The Dreamscape
styleEdits.description: Surreal prints, iridescent fabrics, or fluid shapes that blur the body's lines fit today’s reality bending mood perfectly. There is no better time for fantasy and imagination. Wear the combination that makes no sense on paper but looks like a beautiful fever dream in the mirror.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Close your eyes and imagine your outfit glowing before you step out.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your style feel grounded in reality or lost in fantasy?

styleEdits.title: The Options
styleEdits.description: Indecision can be a style choice if you embrace the eclectic. Can't choose between two vibes? Wear them both. Layer a dressy top over casual bottoms or mix seasons. The "everything everywhere all at once" aesthetic works when you fully commit to the chaos.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Spin around to see all the different angles of your eclectic look.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you struggle to make decisions about what to wear?

styleEdits.title: The Illusion
styleEdits.description: Fashion really is about smoke and mirrors so try playing with proportion and perception. High-waisted cuts to elongate legs, sharp or rounded shoulders to change your frame. Use your clothing to create an illusion of who you want to be today. You can be anyone you choose.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check your reflection and practice a new facial expression.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Who are you pretending to be today?

name: Eight of Cups
description: Practical footwear is essential today as you are metaphorically hiking away from what no longer serves you. A backpack or a crossbody bag keeps your hands free and your load light. Look determined and ready for the next leg of your journey.

styleEdits.title: The Departure
styleEdits.description: Practical footwear is essential today as you are metaphorically hiking away from what no longer serves you. A backpack or a crossbody bag keeps your hands free and your load light. Look determined and ready for the next leg of your journey.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Re-tie your shoelaces properly to prepare for the walk ahead.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What fashion phase are you ready to walk away from?

styleEdits.title: The Transition
styleEdits.description: If you are between states, choose transitional pieces that work in multiple environments. Layers that can be added or removed allow you to adapt as you move from one phase to the next. Pass on anything too rigid or defining. You need to be fluid enough to slip away unnoticed if you feel like it.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check the weather and adjust your layers to match the forecast.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your wardrobe support your personal growth?

styleEdits.title: The Minimalist
styleEdits.description: Leave the baggage behind today. A stripped-back, minimalist aesthetic reflects a desire to travel light. Stick to the absolute essentials and leave any heavy, decorative fluff for another day. We are seeking depth not decoration so keep the surface nice and clean.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Empty your pockets of anything unnecessary before leaving.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Could you survive with only a carry-on suitcase of clothes?

name: Nine of Cups
description: Dress to offend any haters with your excellence. Self-satisfaction is the aesthetic of the day so break out your "trophy" pieces. The designer item you saved up for or the vintage find you hunted down deserves an immediate outing. Dress to impress yourself first and foremost, the rest of the world is just background noise. Bask in the smug glow of knowing you look and feel incredible.

styleEdits.title: The Trophy
styleEdits.description: Dress to offend any haters with your excellence. Self-satisfaction is the aesthetic of the day so break out your "trophy" pieces. The designer item you saved up for or the vintage find you hunted down deserves an immediate outing. Dress to impress yourself first and foremost, the rest of the world is just background noise. Bask in the smug glow of knowing you look and feel incredible.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Preen a little in the mirror and admire your own taste.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe are you most proud of owning?

styleEdits.title: The Wish
styleEdits.description: Dress like your wish has already come true. If you want to be a CEO, dress like one. If you want to be an artist, dress like one. Manifest your desires through your style choices. You are the main character today so ensure the costume fits the role you want to play.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Make a wish as you fasten the final button of your outfit.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit reflect where you are or where you want to be?

styleEdits.title: The Indulgence
styleEdits.description: Treat yourself to the best you have. Wear the silk against your skin or the cashmere socks just because it is a Tuesday. Denying yourself pleasure is out for today. Indulge in the tactile joy of your wardrobe because you deserve to feel expensive.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stroke the fabric of your outfit and appreciate the luxury of it.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you save your "good" clothes for a day that never comes?

name: Ten of Cups
description: Everything in today’s outfit will come together in perfect alignment. Match your accessories to your shoes and your top to your bottom for a cohesive, "happy ending" look. A coordinated set or a well-planned colour palette creates internal peace. It is the outfit equivalent of a family photo where everyone is smiling and no one has their eyes shut.

styleEdits.title: The Harmony
styleEdits.description: Everything in today’s outfit will come together in perfect alignment. Match your accessories to your shoes and your top to your bottom for a cohesive, "happy ending" look. A coordinated set or a well-planned colour palette creates internal peace. It is the outfit equivalent of a family photo where everyone is smiling and no one has their eyes shut.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Align your seams or straighten your belt to physically manifest harmony.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which outfit makes you feel the most put-together?

styleEdits.title: The Community
styleEdits.description: Fashion is a language we share so wear something that connects you to your tribe. A band tee, a local brand, or a cultural signifier that invites connection with like-minded people. Today is about belonging to something bigger than yourself. Wear your community with pride.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Smile at a stranger to build a bridge.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do your clothes connect you to a community?

styleEdits.title: The Rainbow
styleEdits.description: Embrace the rainbow’s full spectrum of colour; if you usually wear black try adding a prismatic accessory or a multicoloured scarf today. It signals hope and joy. Let your outfit be a bold celebration of all the good things that have arrived.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Look for a splash of colour in your environment to match your mood.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your wardrobe have enough colour to reflect your joy?

name: Page of Cups
description: Logic is overrated so dress with whimsy. A puffy sleeve, a floating hem, or a quirky accessory that looks like it came from a fairytale fits the mood. Let your imagination dictate your style today. If it feels magical, wear it.

styleEdits.title: The Daydreamer
styleEdits.description: Logic is overrated so dress with whimsy. A puffy sleeve, a floating hem, or a quirky accessory that looks like it came from a fairytale fits the mood. Let your imagination dictate your style today. If it feels magical, wear it.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Twirl or sway gently to catch the air in your clothes.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What is the most whimsical thing you own?

styleEdits.title: The Surprise
styleEdits.description: The element of surprise is in the air today so try adding an entirely unexpected element to today’s look. A pop of neon in a neutral outfit or a playful pin on a lapel. Keep it lighthearted and fun. Fashion doesn't always have to be so serious.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Put something unexpected in your pocket like a crystal or a note.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you take your style too seriously?

styleEdits.title: The Artist
styleEdits.description: Go ahead and explore your creative voice by treating your body as the canvas. Paint with broad strokes using bold colours or interesting textures. Don't worry about matching; worry about expressing. It is a day to be artful and a little bit experimental.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Trace the lines of your outfit in the air like you are painting yourself.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit express your inner creativity?

name: Knight of Cups
description: Channel a little extra softness in your aesthetic with billowing shirts or poetic blouses. Fabrics that move with a sigh like chiffon or silk set the mood. Keep the collar open and the vibe relaxed. Be the hero of your own romance novel today.

styleEdits.title: The Romantic
