styleEdits.title: The Truth
styleEdits.description: Strip away the soft illusions of comfortable loungewear in favour of unyielding architecture. Look for fabrics that hold their own shape and resist collapsing such as thick cotton weaves or starched linens.Present the absolute reality of your form to the world with clean lines and clear intent.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stand perfectly still for a moment and imagine a line of light travelling up your spine.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your style currently tell the truth about who you are?

styleEdits.title: The Idea
styleEdits.description: New concepts need room to breathe so consider a palette cleanser of minimalism. A monochromatic base allows the shape of the garment to take centre stage without fighting some busy print for attention. Perhaps it is time to revisit that one stark, architectural piece you bought on a whim and barely wore, because simplicity is the ultimate flex when you know what you're doing.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Clear a small space on your dresser or shelf to symbolically make room for the new.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What basic piece do you overlook despite its perfection?

name: Two of Swords
description: If you feel caught between two vibes, then balance is the only way forward. Try harmonising a weighty, grounded lower half with a lighter, floating upper layer to physically manifest equilibrium. Symmetrical styling helps quiet the noise, so ensure your left side mirrors your right. When indecision strikes, wear the item that requires the least amount of adjusting  throughout the day.

styleEdits.title: The Stalemate
styleEdits.description: If you feel caught between two vibes, then balance is the only way forward. Try harmonising a weighty, grounded lower half with a lighter, floating upper layer to physically manifest equilibrium. Symmetrical styling helps quiet the noise, so ensure your left side mirrors your right. When indecision strikes, wear the item that requires the least amount of adjusting  throughout the day.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Cross your arms over your chest to feel the protective barrier of the fabric.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which outfit acts as your "safe space" when the world feels overwhelming?

styleEdits.title: The Blindfold
styleEdits.description: Eyewear can be a brilliant choice today. Oversized frames or a brim that casts a shadow over the eyes offer a necessary barrier. Pop that collar until it meets the brim of your hat and enjoy the blissful silence of being totally checked out from any drama. It's not rude, it's a boundary.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Close your eyes while fastening a button to test your trust in your own hands.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you use accessories to invite connection or to block it?

styleEdits.title: The Truce
styleEdits.description: Peace comes from protecting the heart centre so look for crossed-over silhouettes or double-breasted closures that create a physical shield for the chest today. Thick wools or dense weaves act as built-up armour, allowing you to create a completely secure, heavily defended zone within your own outfit.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Place a hand over your heart and feel the texture of the fabric protecting it.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel the most protected?

name: Three of Swords
description: A visible repair is a massive flex today. Embrace the aesthetic of repair and reuse by wearing something you have mended, modified or distressed. Visible stitching or patchwork adds a narrative of survival to the look and proves that something damaged can be put back together with more character than it started with. Wear your history on your sleeve.

styleEdits.title: The Mending
styleEdits.description: A visible repair is a massive flex today. Embrace the aesthetic of repair and reuse by wearing something you have mended, modified or distressed. Visible stitching or patchwork adds a narrative of survival to the look and proves that something damaged can be put back together with more character than it started with. Wear your history on your sleeve.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Touch a seam or a mend to feel the strength of the thread holding it together.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What worn-out item are you keeping because you love it too much to throw away?

styleEdits.title: The Storm
styleEdits.description: Treat your outfit like a protective shell today. Reach for structured layers or rigid cuts that act as personal armour. Try adding heavy hardware or metallic accents for a little extra grit. Create a clear boundary between you and the outside world with clean lines and an unapologetically secure fit.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Touch a zip, button, or piece of jewellery to feel the cold stability of the metal.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you dress for the weather or for your mood?

styleEdits.title: The Release
styleEdits.description: Constriction is a no-go today so opt for loose, flowing layers instead. Allow the chest and throat plenty of room to breathe by skipping tight collars and restrictive waistbands. Letting the energy circulate is much easier when you wear soft, breathable textures. Treat the fit as a gentle hug rather than a cage.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Exhale deeply while letting your shoulders drop away from your ears.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What are you wearing right now that demands too much effort?

name: Four of Swords
description: Permission to disengage is granted. Channel a mood of horizontal luxury with soft, unstructured textures that hold zero tension and allow the body to fully decompress. You want to look like you could lie down for a nap at any moment and still look entirely editorial.

styleEdits.title: The Retreat
styleEdits.description: Permission to disengage is granted. Channel a mood of horizontal luxury with soft, unstructured textures that hold zero tension and allow the body to fully decompress. You want to look like you could lie down for a nap at any moment and still look entirely editorial.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Pause before putting on your shoes and enjoy the grounding of being barefoot for one more second.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What do you wear when you need to disappear?

styleEdits.title: The Stasis
styleEdits.description: Stillness has its own elegance. A calm palette and unpatterned fabrics reduce visual stimulation, creating a mobile sanctuary of calm. Go ahead and skip anything that jingles, rustles, or demands attention because the aim is to move through the day silent, present, and totally unbothered.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Smooth a wrinkle out of your clothes with a slow, meditative hand motion.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your wardrobe overstimulate you?

styleEdits.title: The Recovery
styleEdits.description: Substantial, dense textures can act like a weighted blanket for the soul and wrap-style garments allow you to effortlessly adjust the fit as your energy fluctuates. You are in power-saving mode, and dressing like it is a totally valid aesthetic choice.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Wrap your arms around yourself and squeeze gently to seal your energy in.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which piece of clothing feels good for your soul?

name: Five of Swords
description: Lean into grit today with distressed textures, raw hems, or crumpled materials that hint at a battle won. Go for a deliberately undone look like rolled sleeves or untucked layers. It projects an unbothered energy that says you have seen it all and you are officially over perfection.

styleEdits.title: The Survivor
styleEdits.description: Lean into grit today with distressed textures, raw hems, or crumpled materials that hint at a battle won. Go for a deliberately undone look like rolled sleeves or untucked layers. It projects an unbothered energy that says you have seen it all and you are officially over perfection.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Dust off your shoulders briskly to physically brush off the conflict.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What item do you wear when you need to feel tough?

styleEdits.title: The Walk Away
styleEdits.description: The argument is over because you’ve already won and left the building. We’re doing a streamlined exit outfit, no bulky accessories to slow down your dramatic strut. Put on those 'Don't call me' boots and walk away before they’ve even realised you're the main character.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check your reflection one last time then turn your back on it decisively.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your footwear allow you to move fast enough?

styleEdits.title: The Scrappy Win
styleEdits.description: Sometimes you have to piece an outfit together from whatever is lying around. Get creative with what you have by layering unexpected items, such as a summer piece over a winter base. It is eclectic, resourceful, and slightly chaotic but it proves you can pull an excellent silhouette out of complete wardrobe disorder.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Adjust a cuff or collar to a weird angle just to prove you make the rules.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: When was the last time you styled an outfit entirely by accident?

name: Six of Swords
description: Travel-ready garments that resist creasing and offer easy movement are essential today. Prioritise smooth, fluid fabrics that flow with you rather than fighting against you. Channel an "en route" energy: densely layered, ready to move, and looking incredibly intentional doing it.

styleEdits.title: The Transit
styleEdits.description: Travel-ready garments that resist creasing and offer easy movement are essential today. Prioritise smooth, fluid fabrics that flow with you rather than fighting against you. Channel an "en route" energy: densely layered, ready to move, and looking incredibly intentional doing it.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Put your keys in a specific pocket to anchor your intention to move forward.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What is your go-to outfit for a long journey?

styleEdits.title: The Baggage
styleEdits.description: We all have baggage so you might as well accessorise it. Choose a bag or pockets that can actually hold what you need to bring with you, both literally and metaphorically. Your outer layer needs to be substantial enough to act as a proper buffer against the elements. Fix your posture, balance the weight of the proportions, and carry the hefty layers like they weigh nothing.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check the weight of your bag and consciously decide it is manageable.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Are you carrying too much, literally or stylishly?

styleEdits.title: The Grey Day
styleEdits.description: Lean into a muted or cool-toned palette that keeps the mood quiet. Keep textures smooth and unobtrusive so your mind has room to drift.  It is a beautifully understated look that focuses entirely on calm, tonal styling rather than screaming for high contrast.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Pull your sleeves down over your hands for a moment of comfort.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you shy away from wearing cool or quiet tones?

name: Seven of Swords
description: Feeling a little mischievous? Subvert expectations by playing a game of opposites. If you grab a casual hoodie, go ahead and pair it with formal trousers. If the boots are heavy, make the top layer delicate. Keep flipping the switch until the tension feels electric. The goal is to get away with breaking the rules so if it feels slightly risky you are on the right track.

styleEdits.title: The Rogue
styleEdits.description: Feeling a little mischievous? Subvert expectations by playing a game of opposites. If you grab a casual hoodie, go ahead and pair it with formal trousers. If the boots are heavy, make the top layer delicate. Keep flipping the switch until the tension feels electric. The goal is to get away with breaking the rules so if it feels slightly risky you are on the right track.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check your pockets to make sure your secrets are safe.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: When did you last dress specifically to break a fashion rule?

styleEdits.title: The Incognito
styleEdits.description: Some days the best strategy is to blend in until the moment strikes. Nondescript, utilitarian layers allow you to move unobserved, while hoods and matte fabrics help you slide under the radar. Be a chameleon today by keeping the vibe exceptionally low-key, strictly functional, and highly mysterious.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Pull up a hood or collar to activate stealth mode.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Can you disappear in your clothes if you want to?

styleEdits.title: The Strategy
styleEdits.description: Think about coordinating layers so that shedding one reveals a totally different vibe underneath. This is a day for tactical dressing, preparing for multiple scenarios with a single, highly planned look. A reversible garment or highly convertible accessory is the ultimate flex here.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Adjust a layer to reveal or conceal what is underneath to test your options.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you plan your outfits or do they just happen?

name: Eight of Swords
description: Control the narrative by tightening the fit yourself. Use belts, ties, or structured waists to physically lock the shape down. A tightly controlled, cinched look is a major power move, provided you are the one deciding exactly how tight the knot should be.

styleEdits.title: The Bind
styleEdits.description: Control the narrative by tightening the fit yourself. Use belts, ties, or structured waists to physically lock the shape down. A tightly controlled, cinched look is a major power move, provided you are the one deciding exactly how tight the knot should be.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Tighten a belt or lace and consciously acknowledge your own limits.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What is feeling a bit too tight in your life right now?

styleEdits.title: The Filter
styleEdits.description: Sensory overload is real so take a break by building a physical filter. Consider high necklines, long sleeves, and opaque textures that minimise skin exposure. Think of it as noise-cancelling headphones for the body. You are still physically present; you are just choosing exactly how much of you actually participates in the day.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Cover your ears for a moment before stepping out to enjoy the silence.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you use clothes to keep the world out?

styleEdits.title: The Perception
styleEdits.description: Expand your reality by completely challenging your own rigid rules about what "goes" together. Wear the "wrong" shoes with the "wrong" trousers or skirt because breaking fashion rules can remind you that the bars of the cage remain open.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Undo a button or loosen a tie to prove you can free yourself.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What fashion rule do you follow out of fear?

name: Nine of Swords
description: Embrace the dishevelled aesthetic. Oversized shirts, wrinkled linens, or soft, lounge-style pieces can look incredibly intentional if you wear it with enough confidence. Dark sunglasses are highly recommended to finish off the look. Looking effortless actually requires very little effort today. Who said you can’t look cool even if you feel exhausted?

styleEdits.title: The Insomnia Chic
styleEdits.description: Embrace the dishevelled aesthetic. Oversized shirts, wrinkled linens, or soft, lounge-style pieces can look incredibly intentional if you wear it with enough confidence. Dark sunglasses are highly recommended to finish off the look. Looking effortless actually requires very little effort today. Who said you can’t look cool even if you feel exhausted?
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Put on your sunglasses indoors for three seconds to claim your space.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What styling trick do you rely on to fake a full night of sleep?

styleEdits.title: The Weight
styleEdits.description: Feeling a bit untethered? Ground yourself with heavy textiles. Reach for dense layers or a weighted jacket that provides some comforting physical pressure. It helps to add actual mass to your frame in order to remain anchored. Let your outfit do the heavy lifting today so your mind can relax.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Press your feet firmly into the floor and feel the weight of your shoes.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you own clothes that physically ground you?

styleEdits.title: The Shadow
styleEdits.description: A head-to-toe deep palette absorbs the noise and creates a cool, unified vibe at the same time. Try playing with textures, like matte against high-shine, to keep the monochrome look interesting. It shows you are processing the aesthetic with actual style choices rather than just defaulting to the same old basics.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Brush your hand down your front as if sweeping away a bad dream.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does wearing dark colours make you feel invisible or invincible?

name: Ten of Swords
description: If you’re closing a chapter, you might as well make it a spectacle. The energy today is pure season finale so lean into the high drama with floor-sweeping lengths, exaggerated shoulders, or a back detail that demands absolute attention when you turn around. Make sure the last thing they see of you is unforgettable.

styleEdits.title: The Dramatic Exit
styleEdits.description: If you’re closing a chapter, you might as well make it a spectacle. The energy today is pure season finale so lean into the high drama with floor-sweeping lengths, exaggerated shoulders, or a back detail that demands absolute attention when you turn around. Make sure the last thing they see of you is unforgettable.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stand tall and imagine pulling a sword out of your back before walking on.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What do you wear when you want to be remembered?

styleEdits.title: The Dawn
styleEdits.description: Lighter, airy textures that catch the light signal a fresh start. A fresh, pressed shirt can act as a reset button for your mood. Try dropping the dense armour in favour of clean lines, a light palette, and a completely unbothered, easy drape.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Take a deep breath and physically relax your shoulders.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What piece makes you feel brand new?

styleEdits.title: The Pin Cushion
styleEdits.description: You might have taken a few hits recently but hey, you are still standing. Celebrate that grit with textures that can take a beating. Go for rugged finishes or hardware details to create a physical barrier between you and any fresh drama. You are tough so make sure your outfit has some backbone too.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Run your hand over a textured part of your outfit to remind yourself of your edges.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe makes you feel unbreakable?

name: Page of Swords
description: Curiosity requires you to be quick on your feet today so keep your layers light and mobile. Opt for smooth, agile textures that allow you to pivot quickly. A high collar or structured neckline gives you somewhere to tuck your chin while you observe the room. You are basically gathering intel today so dress like the most stylish spy in the building.

styleEdits.title: The Observer
styleEdits.description: Curiosity requires you to be quick on your feet today so keep your layers light and mobile. Opt for smooth, agile textures that allow you to pivot quickly. A high collar or structured neckline gives you somewhere to tuck your chin while you observe the room. You are basically gathering intel today so dress like the most stylish spy in the building.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Adjust your collar and quickly scan the room from left to right.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you dress to be seen or to see everything?

styleEdits.title: The Experiment
styleEdits.description: Why follow the rules when you can just rewrite them? Shake things up by building your look in reverse. Start with the socks or shoes, then jump straight to the headwear or earrings, filling in the middle last. It’s a little chaotic, sure, but it stops you from reaching for the same old combos and helps you see your clothes with fresh eyes.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Turn a garment inside out or inspect the lining to see how it was made.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: When was the last time you surprised yourself with an outfit?

styleEdits.title: The Messenger
styleEdits.description: Let your outfit do the talking today. A graphic print or a piece with high visual impact sets the tone instantly. You don't need literal words to make a statement when you can just choose a look that projects clear intent. Your message will land before you even say a word.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check your phone or watch while striking a deliberate pose.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What does your favourite outfit say about you?

name: Knight of Swords
description: Cut the drag today with streamlined silhouettes that sit close to the body to give you an aerodynamic edge. Opt for sleek, friction-free textures that suggest you are already moving faster than everyone else. Keep it fast, focused and bulk-free because you’ve got places to be.

styleEdits.title: The Velocity
styleEdits.description: Cut the drag today with streamlined silhouettes that sit close to the body to give you an aerodynamic edge. Opt for sleek, friction-free textures that suggest you are already moving faster than everyone else. Keep it fast, focused and bulk-free because you’ve got places to be.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Fasten a zip or button with a quick, decisive motion to match your tempo.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do your clothes keep up with you?

styleEdits.title: The Direct Approach
styleEdits.description: Subtlety is overrated when your outfit has a point to make so try sharp angles and defined shoulders to cut through any confusion. Look for clothing that creates a distinct V-shape or arrow-like form, creating a visual vector pointing exactly where you want to go. Directness is a brilliant style choice all on its own.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Point your toes directly towards your destination before taking the first step.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe makes you feel the most assertive?

styleEdits.title: The Impulse
styleEdits.description: Trust your first instinct and grab the first thing that catches your eye. There is a cool energy in spontaneous styling that overthinking completely kills. Throw on that jacket you bought on a whim or the shoes you usually save for "later." Later is now, so ride that wave of impulsive energy and see where it takes you.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Put on your shoes before you have fully decided where you are going.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What is the most impulsive fashion purchase you actually wear?

name: Queen of Swords
description: Style is 10% what you put on and 90% what you ruthlessly discard. Try the add-then-subtract trick. Pile on everything you love, then look in the mirror and cut the noise until only the sharpest truth remains. If it doesn’t serve the overall shape, it’s just a distraction and iit has to go. Be the editor your wardrobe is afraid of.

styleEdits.title: The Editor
styleEdits.description: Style is 10% what you put on and 90% what you ruthlessly discard. Try the add-then-subtract trick. Pile on everything you love, then look in the mirror and cut the noise until only the sharpest truth remains. If it doesn’t serve the overall shape, it’s just a distraction and iit has to go. Be the editor your wardrobe is afraid of.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Run a hand over your silhouette to smooth away any imaginary imperfections.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your style feel cluttered or curated?

styleEdits.title: The Boundary
styleEdits.description: Claim your space with crisp, structured textures that hold their own shape. A stiff collar or a defined cuff creates a physical boundary between you and the world, instantly inviting respect. Wear your standards high and your fabrics opaque.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stand with your hands on your hips to physically claim your personal space.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel untouchable?

styleEdits.title: The Truth Teller
styleEdits.description: Today’s energy is all about transparency so let the construction of the outfit show. Exposed seams, raw edges, or minimal linings prove you have absolutely nothing to hide. Wear pieces that feel authentic to who you actually are, and leave the costumes to someone else.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Look yourself in the eye in the mirror and nod once in approval.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you dress to please others or yourself?

name: King of Swords
description: Command the room solely with the architecture of your clothing. We want dense, substantial fabrics that hang with absolute purpose. A longline coat or a perfectly pressed tailoring communicates serious intent, establishing yourself through the integrity of your textiles. You are the one setting the standard today.

styleEdits.title: The Authority
styleEdits.description: Command the room solely with the architecture of your clothing. We want dense, substantial fabrics that hang with absolute purpose. A longline coat or a perfectly pressed tailoring communicates serious intent, establishing yourself through the integrity of your textiles. You are the one setting the standard today.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Straighten your back and align your shoulders with the seams of your garment.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which outfit makes you feel like the boss?

styleEdits.title: The Intellect
styleEdits.description: Cooler heads prevail so reflect that with a palette of cool, clarifying tones. Stark, clinical shades or icy neutrals suggest a mind operating at peak efficiency. The fit should be precise and tailored leaving minimal room for misinterpretations or sloppy, slouchy draping.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Tap your temple or forehead lightly to centre your thoughts before leaving.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your wardrobe reflect your intelligence?

styleEdits.title: The Standard
styleEdits.description: Ethical dressing is the ultimate flex for the modern leader. Choose garments with a story of quality and longevity rather than chasing fast trends. Wearing a piece you have looked after for years shows discipline and respect, so uphold the law of good taste by focusing entirely on archival quality and rejecting disposable culture.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Brush a speck of dust off your shoulder to maintain your standards.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe has stood the test of time? # Suit of Wands

name: Ace of Pentacles
description: Dress with tangible prosperity today to invite fresh opportunity. Focus on tactile luxury and fabrics that feel substantial like heavy cotton or quality leather. Treat your outfit like a solid asset with a high Return on Investment. Debut a piece you intend to wear for years to come to set a new standard.

styleEdits.title: The Investment
styleEdits.description: Dress with tangible prosperity today to invite fresh opportunity. Focus on tactile luxury and fabrics that feel substantial like heavy cotton or quality leather. Treat your outfit like a solid asset with a high Return on Investment. Debut a piece you intend to wear for years to come to set a new standard.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Rub the fabric of your outfit between your thumb and finger to appreciate the quality.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe feels like the best investment you ever made?

styleEdits.title: The Seed
styleEdits.description: Time to hard-launch the upgrade. Dress for the tax bracket you want, not the one you have until reality catches up. Use weighted accessories like a heavy watch or a solid, structured bag to anchor the vision. It doesn’t matter if it came from a designer sale or a thrift shop bin. If you look like you own the building, they’ll eventually stop asking for your ID at the front desk.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Adjust your watch or bag strap. Feel the weight of your intention.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your wardrobe support the life you are trying to grow?

styleEdits.title: The Manifestation
styleEdits.description: We are manifesting major returns today so dress like you are ready to collect. Ground the look with tactile, matte textures that feel expensive to the touch. You’re going to need pockets. Deep ones. You’ll require literal storage space for the successes when they inevitably land.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Place your hands deep in your pockets. Claim the space.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What would the most successful version of you wear today?

name: Two of Pentacles
description: Life requires flexibility today so your outfit should offer a full range of motion. Stretchy textiles, elasticated waists, or jersey blends allow you to pivot gracefully between tasks. Avoid anything too rigid that might snap under pressure. You are balancing multiple priorities so ensure your clothes can keep up with the tempo.

styleEdits.title: The Juggle
styleEdits.description: Life requires flexibility today so your outfit should offer a full range of motion. Stretchy textiles, elasticated waists, or jersey blends allow you to pivot gracefully between tasks. Avoid anything too rigid that might snap under pressure. You are balancing multiple priorities so ensure your clothes can keep up with the tempo.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Sway gently from side to side to find your centre of gravity.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit work for every part of your day?

styleEdits.title: The Flux
styleEdits.description: Change is the only constant so layer up to adapt to shifting environments. A modular approach with a removable jacket or scarf helps you regulate your temperature as you move from one space to another. The infinity symbol is the key energy of the day so look for continuous lines and fluid loops in your accessories.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Take a layer off and put it back on to practice adaptability.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: How easily can you transition your look from day to night?

styleEdits.title: The Balance
styleEdits.description: Maintain equilibrium with a perfectly weighted ensemble. If you wear a voluminous top, balance it with a streamlined, sharp bottom half or vice versa. Visual weight distribution helps the mind feel steady even when the energy is chaotic. Keep the scales even through clever styling.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Shift your weight entirely to one side. Feel your footwear hold the balance.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you tend to dress for comfort or for style?

name: Three of Pentacles
description: Allow craftsmanship to take centre stage today. Highlight the construction of your clothes by choosing pieces with visible seams, intricate stitching, or interesting structural details. Celebrate the skill of the maker. It is a day to appreciate the architecture of what you wear and the hands that made it.

styleEdits.title: The Masterpiece
styleEdits.description: Allow craftsmanship to take centre stage today. Highlight the construction of your clothes by choosing pieces with visible seams, intricate stitching, or interesting structural details. Celebrate the skill of the maker. It is a day to appreciate the architecture of what you wear and the hands that made it.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Inspect a seam or a detail on your clothes to acknowledge the craftsmanship.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you know who made your clothes?

styleEdits.title: The Team Player
styleEdits.description: Remember, you are part of a greater whole so try leaning into the aesthetic of the uniform today. Matching sets, monochromatic palettes, or utility wear suggest a readiness to work with others. It is about fitting into the structure while bringing your own unique flair to the shape.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Adjust your cuffs or collar to signal you mean business.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your style help you connect with your peers?

styleEdits.title: The Detail
styleEdits.description: Success lies in the details. Elevate a simple look with one meticulously chosen element like a statement belt, a polished shoe, or a perfectly folded pocket square. Small, precise touches show that you are paying absolute attention to the fine print of the outfit.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Straighten or adjust one small detail to perfection before leaving.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What small detail in your outfit brings you the most joy?

name: Four of Pentacles
description: Protect your energy today by buttoning up. High necklines, double-breasted coats, and sturdy closures create a sense of security. Keep your resources close to your chest with cross-body bags or internal pockets. It is a valid choice to keep your magic under aesthetic wraps today.

styleEdits.title: The Vault
styleEdits.description: Protect your energy today by buttoning up. High necklines, double-breasted coats, and sturdy closures create a sense of security. Keep your resources close to your chest with cross-body bags or internal pockets. It is a valid choice to keep your magic under aesthetic wraps today.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Cross your arms or wrap a coat tighter to feel secure.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel the most safe?

styleEdits.title: The Hold
styleEdits.description: Stability is the goal today so choose garments that hold you firmly. Structured tailoring, corsetry-inspired waists, or belts that cinch slightly could provide a comforting pressure. It is about containing your energy within a defined silhouette. Enjoy the feeling of being physically supported by your wardrobe.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check that your bag is securely closed to affirm your boundaries.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you hold onto clothes you no longer wear?

styleEdits.title: The Foundation
styleEdits.description: Stick to what you know works. Rely on the foundational pieces of your wardrobe that have never let you down. The trusty boots, the perfect coat, the durable denim. There is no need to experiment today. Find comfort in the reliability of your favourites.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stand still and feel the support of your shoes on the floor.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What are the four pillars of your wardrobe?

name: Five of Pentacles
description: We are pivoting to grunge today. Embrace the aesthetic of the outsider with distressed textures and raw hems. Frayed denim or vintage pieces with a history capture that resilient energy perfectly. There is a specific kind of cool in a thoroughly lived-in outfit.

styleEdits.title: The Outsider
styleEdits.description: We are pivoting to grunge today. Embrace the aesthetic of the outsider with distressed textures and raw hems. Frayed denim or vintage pieces with a history capture that resilient energy perfectly. There is a specific kind of cool in a thoroughly lived-in outfit.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Run your thumb over a rough seam, a zipper, or a raw edge. Connect with the grit.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe has survived the hardest times with you?

styleEdits.title: The Seek
styleEdits.description: Budget is a state of mind. We’re shopping the archive today and forcing a hostile collab between items that usually never meet like a formal dress over trousers or two clashing prints that absolutely hate each other. It’s resourceful, it’s scrappy, and it proves that style is the only currency that never devalues.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check your pockets for loose change or a forgotten treasure.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: How many outfits can you make without buying anything?

styleEdits.title: The Sanctuary
styleEdits.description: Focus on the physical sensation of shelter. Thick hoodies, heavy wools, and shearling textures offer a portable sanctuary against the elements. If the world feels cold ensure your outfit provides the heat. Dress like you are your own safe haven.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Pull up a hood or collar to block out the bad vibes.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit feel like a shelter?

name: Six of Pentacles
description: Generosity flows both ways so dress with an open spirit. Soft, draping fabrics that move away from the body suggest an abundance of material. Give anything too tight or restrictive a miss today. You want to look like you have more than enough energy to share with the room.

styleEdits.title: The Exchange
styleEdits.description: Generosity flows both ways so dress with an open spirit. Soft, draping fabrics that move away from the body suggest an abundance of material. Give anything too tight or restrictive a miss today. You want to look like you have more than enough energy to share with the room.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Open your palms or extend a hand to mimic the flow of giving.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe would you happily lend to a friend?

styleEdits.title: The Balance
styleEdits.description: We are matching energy today, so keep the proportions 50/50. If you go oversized on top then keep the bottom streamlined. Use a belt to split the difference. The silhouette should give as much as it takes so keep the visuals level.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Adjust your clothing so it sits evenly on your shoulders.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you have a healthy balance of basics and statement pieces?

styleEdits.title: The Quality
styleEdits.description: Invest in quality over quantity today. Wear the one item you own that feels truly expensive regardless of the brand or price tag. Natural fibres like silk, linen, or wool speak of value and longevity. It is better to wear one beautiful thing than ten mediocre ones.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Brush or smooth a high-quality fabric to appreciate its worth.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you value the clothes you wear?

name: Seven of Pentacles
description: Good things take time so celebrate the slow fashion aesthetic. Wear something that has taken a long time to break in like vintage denim or perfectly softened leather. These pieces show the passage of time and the value of patience. Rushing is the enemy of style today.

styleEdits.title: The Patience
styleEdits.description: Good things take time so celebrate the slow fashion aesthetic. Wear something that has taken a long time to break in like vintage denim or perfectly softened leather. These pieces show the passage of time and the value of patience. Rushing is the enemy of style today.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check the time on your watch or phone but move slowly.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe gets better with age?

styleEdits.title: The Assessment
styleEdits.description: Take stock of what you have. A pared-back, neutral look allows you to step back and evaluate your progress. Earth tones like heavy terracotta, deep olive, or dark brown provide grounding energy to the look. You are in a growth phase so dress comfortably for the long haul.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stand back from the mirror to view your whole silhouette.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Are you happy with how your personal style is growing?

styleEdits.title: The Pruning
styleEdits.description: Growth requires editing so keep your look clean and free of dead weight. Remove the unnecessary accessories and focus on the essential silhouette. Just as a gardener prunes the vine you should prune the outfit and let the strongest branches of your style stand out.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Remove one accessory that feels superfluous.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What needs to be cleared out of your wardrobe?

name: Eight of Pentacles
description: Dedication to the craft is the vibe so embrace the workwear aesthetic. Durable fabrics like denim, drill, or canvas are fit for purpose. Patch pockets and utility details suggest you are ready to get your hands dirty. Mastery comes from repetition so wear your uniform with pride.

styleEdits.title: The Apprentice
styleEdits.description: Dedication to the craft is the vibe so embrace the workwear aesthetic. Durable fabrics like denim, drill, or canvas are fit for purpose. Patch pockets and utility details suggest you are ready to get your hands dirty. Mastery comes from repetition so wear your uniform with pride.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Roll up your sleeves to signal readiness for the task.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you have a "uniform" that helps you focus?

styleEdits.title: The Detail
styleEdits.description: Focus on the microscopic details. Intricate patterns, fine embroidery, or delicate jewellery show an appreciation for precision. It is a day to sweat the small stuff in the best way possible. Let your outfit reveal more the closer people get.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Examine a button or stitch closely to appreciate the work.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you notice the small details in your clothing?

styleEdits.title: The Routine
styleEdits.description: There is power in a ritual so wear the outfit that makes you feel most productive. Reliability is sexy today, so choose the ensemble that you know works perfectly every time. Consistency builds a legacy so stick to the script.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Put your clothes on in the exact same order as yesterday.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which outfit makes you feel the most productive?

name: Nine of Pentacles
description: Surround yourself with floral prints, botanical textures, or rich, earthy colours that suggest a blooming garden. Cultivate a luxurious, blooming aesthetic and dress like the gardener who can finally enjoy the flowers. Silk or velvet adds a touch of necessary “I did this myself” decadence.

styleEdits.title: The Garden
styleEdits.description: Surround yourself with floral prints, botanical textures, or rich, earthy colours that suggest a blooming garden. Cultivate a luxurious, blooming aesthetic and dress like the gardener who can finally enjoy the flowers. Silk or velvet adds a touch of necessary “I did this myself” decadence.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Take a deep breath and imagine smelling a flower.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which outfit makes you feel independent?

styleEdits.title: The Bird
styleEdits.description: The theme is Main Character: Retirement Edition. You want a look that says 'I’m wealthy enough to be eccentric but too disciplined to be messy.' A gloved hand or a structured cuff adds an air of aristocratic control. Wear something that feels exclusive to you. It’s wild, it’s disciplined, and it’s strictly by invitation only.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Rest your hand on your hip or a surface with deliberate elegance.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What is the most luxurious thing you do for yourself?

styleEdits.title: The Solitary
styleEdits.description: Enjoy your own company in high-quality comfort. Cashmere, fine linens, or soft leather are purely for your enjoyment alone. After all, you don't need an audience to dress well. The ultimate luxury is dressing up when you have nowhere to go.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stroke a soft fabric and enjoy the sensation for yourself.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you dress up even when you are alone?

name: Ten of Pentacles
description: Heritage is always in style so reach for the classics today. Tweed, houndstooth, or tartan connect you to tradition and longevity. Maybe wear a piece that has been passed down or one that you intend to pass on. Step into the energy of a legacy by wearing the pieces that feel like they have a story to tell, even if you’re just starting the first chapter.

styleEdits.title: The Legacy
styleEdits.description: Heritage is always in style so reach for the classics today. Tweed, houndstooth, or tartan connect you to tradition and longevity. Maybe wear a piece that has been passed down or one that you intend to pass on. Step into the energy of a legacy by wearing the pieces that feel like they have a story to tell, even if you’re just starting the first chapter.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Touch a piece of jewellery or clothing that has a history.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What will you leave behind in your wardrobe?

styleEdits.title: The Establishment
styleEdits.description: We’re manifesting Family Dynasty today. Dress like you’re about to disown a nephew by opting for heavy, structured coats or blazers that create a strong silhouette. Quality fabrics that hold their shape imply an unshakeable foundation. Even if your bank account says 'instant noodles,' it doesn’t mean your outfit can’t say ‘generational wealth’.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stand tall and imagine you are the head of a great house.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your style feel fleeting or permanent?

styleEdits.title: The Home
styleEdits.description: Bring the comfort of the home into the world. Quilted textures, blanket coats, or warm, earthy tones create a mobile sense of belonging. You carry your stability with you. Dress like you belong everywhere you go.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Wrap your coat around you like a blanket.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit make you feel grounded?

name: Page of Pentacles
description: Curiosity is grounding so adopt a studious aesthetic today. Preppy influences like loafers, collars, or satchel bags fit the mood perfectly. Practicality is highly stylish here, so ensure the footwear is comfortable enough to actually get things done.

styleEdits.title: The Student
styleEdits.description: Curiosity is grounding so adopt a studious aesthetic today. Preppy influences like loafers, collars, or satchel bags fit the mood perfectly. Practicality is highly stylish here, so ensure the footwear is comfortable enough to actually get things done.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Adjust your glasses or rub your chin thoughtfully.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What can your wardrobe teach you today?

styleEdits.title: The Tangible
styleEdits.description: Focus on what is real; choose natural fibres like cotton, wool, or textured linen that feel authentic against the skin. Pass on synthetics or anything too flashy. Today is about appreciating the simple, tactile joy of wearing real clothes. Keep it grounded and real.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Touch a natural surface like wood or stone to ground yourself.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you prefer natural fibres or synthetics?

styleEdits.title: The Investment
styleEdits.description: Start small but start well. Wear the highest quality basics you own. A perfectly simple tee or a great pair of socks can be the foundation of a great day. You are planting seeds for the future, so ensure the basics are solid.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check the soles of your shoes to ensure a good foundation.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: What is the most reliable basic you own?

name: Knight of Pentacles
description: Slow and steady wins the race so dress for reliability. Heavy boots, utility jackets, and durable trousers suggest you are in it for the long haul. Remember, there is no need to rush. Your style today should say you are dependable, grounded, and ready to do the work.

styleEdits.title: The Method
styleEdits.description: Slow and steady wins the race so dress for reliability. Heavy boots, utility jackets, and durable trousers suggest you are in it for the long haul. Remember, there is no need to rush. Your style today should say you are dependable, grounded, and ready to do the work.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Tie your laces with deliberate slowness and care.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which pair of shoes can you walk the furthest in?

styleEdits.title: The Earth
styleEdits.description: Connect to the terrain with an outdoorsy aesthetic. Waterproofs, waxes, and earthy tones like moss green or mud brown fit the vibe. You might be navigating rough ground so ensure your gear is up to the task. Practicality is the highest form of chic today.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stomp your feet lightly to feel the earth beneath you.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Is your wardrobe practical for your lifestyle?

styleEdits.title: The Routine
styleEdits.description: Consistency is your superpower today. Wear the outfit that you just know works perfectly every time. It is not boring, it is efficient. Remove the decision fatigue of what to wear and free up energy for the task at hand.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check your reflection and confirm you are ready for the day.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you have a reliable "go-to" outfit?

name: Queen of Pentacles
description: Comfort is luxury so prioritise soft, embracing textures. Wraps, shawls, and cosy knits allow you to channel your nurturing side. A warm and earthy palette suggests abundance and care. If you are going to be a provider of comfort, you need to ensure you’re comfortable first.

styleEdits.title: The Nurturer
styleEdits.description: Comfort is luxury so prioritise soft, embracing textures. Wraps, shawls, and cosy knits allow you to channel your nurturing side. A warm and earthy palette suggests abundance and care. If you are going to be a provider of comfort, you need to ensure you’re comfortable first.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Place a hand on your belly to ground your energy.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit nourish you?

styleEdits.title: The Resource
styleEdits.description: You already have everything you need to get dressed. Practicality meets luxury in items like a good quality leather bag or a well made coat with deep pockets. Be prepared for anything and look great doing it.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Check your bag to ensure you have your essentials.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you feel resourceful in your clothes?

styleEdits.title: The Texture
styleEdits.description: Engage the senses with a mix of rich textures. Combine wool with silk or leather with cashmere. It is about your tactile experience of the world. Revel in the physical sensation of your clothing. It should feel as good as it looks.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Run your hand over the different textures of your outfit.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which fabric feels the most grounding to you?

name: King of Pentacles
description: Success leaves clues, so dress like you have already made it. Immaculate tailoring, high-quality accessories, and a confident silhouette command the room. You don't need to shout to be heard. Let the quality of your clothes do the talking instead.

styleEdits.title: The Tycoon
styleEdits.description: Success leaves clues, so dress like you have already made it. Immaculate tailoring, high-quality accessories, and a confident silhouette command the room. You don't need to shout to be heard. Let the quality of your clothes do the talking instead.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Adjust your cuffs or collar with the confidence of a CEO.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit reflect your ambition?

styleEdits.title: The Cornerstone
styleEdits.description: Be the rock. Choose heavy, substantial fabrics that give you a physical presence. A coat with severe lines or a dense knit adds gravity to your look. If people look to you for stability, then your outfit can certainly help you look unshakable.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Stand with your feet wide and feel your stability.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel the most solid?

styleEdits.title: The Epicurean
styleEdits.description: Treat yourself like the main course today. Wear the velvet, silk, and gold because life is too short for scratchy, uncomfortable fabrics. Stop saving the "good clothes" for a special occasion because today is the occasion. If the fabric doesn't feel like a bribe against your skin, it’s not worthy of royalty.
styleEdits.dailyRitual: Take a moment to simply appreciate the luxury of being dressed.
styleEdits.wardrobeReflection: Do you allow yourself to enjoy your own success?
